articles.title: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour - BBC
articles.description: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.
articles.content: The wide-ranging tour will include stop-offs in 11 cities in four countries: Algeria, Cameroon, Angola and Equatorial Guinea. In all, the Pope will travel nearly 18,000 km (11,185 miles), clocking up… [+35 chars]
